Explain that I recently moved from Florida (zip code **32169**) to Phoenix (zip code **85033**) and need my address updated.

Ask the agent to pull up my current (old) address from my existing order on file — making clear I **will not state it myself**, but I want them to confirm it and then update it to the new Phoenix address.

Ask the agent what the **cheapest available t-shirt** is right now and its price.
Ask whether I can **place an order for that t-shirt** directly through the agent in this same interaction.
Confirm all changes and wrap up the conversation with a parting joke.
